title: API-first data contracts and schema shaping
policy_gate: authorization spec, provider/source terms, redaction, challenge gate, evidence before delivery
release_gate: second replay can shape the same fixture without live access or hidden provider calls
surface: schema-first ingestion contracts and VHub export

title: Source shape inspector for TSV, JSON, HTML, and image paths
policy_gate: fixtures and captured sessions first; live promotion requires verified source receipt
release_gate: shape report names source kind, strategy, fields, tables, and next actions
surface: prompt-to-schema loop for local evidence before API promotion

title: Network tap and instant API workbench
policy_gate: authorized session required for private surfaces, redact before AI, read-only probe first
release_gate: tap mine emits replayable endpoint candidates without credentials or secret payloads

title: Local vault and env profile references
inputs: value env var or local value
policy_gate: secret values never print; specs and receipts use refs and fingerprints only
release_gate: vault-show and vault-list expose refs and redacted values, not material secrets
surface: credential refs for client kits, authenticated ops, and provider sessions

title: Client capability kits, live proof gates, and prod readiness
policy_gate: client scope, provider requirements, live receipt, and disclaimer gates before promotion
release_gate: kit install receipt links dry-run artifacts, live requirements, and acceptance checks
surface: client-ready packages for Veeper, MyBible, MiCasitaDigna, Spaceship ops, and credentialed backends

title: Ready APIs and structured data update bindings
policy_gate: official or licensed provider first, source attribution, freshness audit, no secret capture
release_gate: ready API spec declares inputs, outputs, engines, policy, and mock or evidence path
surface: domain APIs for web evidence, jobs, sports, crypto market data, and client backends

title: Procedure, assessment, and synthetic profile wizards
policy_gate: no submit, payment, credential, or real-person claim without explicit confirmation and consent scope
release_gate: wizard output carries route requirements and visible human review gates
surface: procedure simplification, test rehearsal, and profile scaffolding

title: VHub MySQL fill runner and guarded delivery
policy_gate: env refs via venvfile, slugged run ids, root-safe paths, dry-run before delivery
release_gate: runner records a deterministic run id and can operate without printing secrets
surface: guarded provider-to-database delivery for internal pipelines
